perturbation.original_text: 4. Fees for Customizations: [SPECIFY TIME AND MATERIALS RATES ([Indicate any "not to exceed" limit on T&M Customization costs) OR FIXED PRICE] If the proposed price Is Increased by Supplier upon delivery to Bank of America of detailed specifications or at any other time hereafter, Bank of America may terminate this Schedule and shall receive a refund of all amounts previously paid hereunder.
perturbation.changed_text: 4. Fees for Customizations: [SPECIFY TIME AND MATERIALS RATES ([Indicate any "not to exceed" limit on T&M Customization costs) OR FIXED PRICE] If the proposed price Is Increased by Supplier upon delivery to Bank of America of detailed specifications or at any other time hereafter, Bank of America may terminate this Schedule; however, no refunds will be issued for amounts previously paid hereunder, unless the increase exceeds 20% of the original quoted price.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation introduces an in-text contradiction by modifying the refund policy. The original clause states that Bank of America receives a full refund if the price increases. The modified clause states that no refunds will be issued, unless the increase exceeds 20% of the original quoted price. This creates uncertainty about whether Bank of America is entitled to a refund if the price increases, leading to potential disputes. The contradiction occurs within Section 4 itself.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 4. Fees for Customizations: [SPECIFY TIME AND MATERIALS RATES ([Indicate any "not to exceed" limit on T&M Customization costs) OR FIXED PRICE] If the proposed price Is Increased by Supplier upon delivery to Bank of America of detailed specifications or at any other time hereafter, Bank of America may terminate this Schedule; however, no refunds will be issued for amounts previously paid hereunder, unless the increase exceeds 20% of the original quoted price.
perturbation.justification: The changed text directly contradicts itself. The original text stated that upon price increase, Bank of America would receive a full refund. The changed text states that no refunds will be issued unless the price increase exceeds 20% of the original quote. This change creates a direct conflict in the refund policy, leading to an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: 6 The Delivery and Installation Schedule for this Customization is: Delivery Date: Installation Date: [Insert any other Schedule Information pertaining to the Delivery or Installation of the Product]
perturbation.changed_text: 6 The Delivery and Installation Schedule for this Customization is: Delivery Date: Installation Date: [Insert any other Schedule Information pertaining to the Delivery or Installation of the Product]. Delivery must occur within 30 days of the Delivery Date specified above. If delivery does not occur within 60 days of the Delivery Date, this schedule is automatically terminated without penalty.
perturbation.explanation: The added sentences create an in-text contradiction regarding the consequences of late delivery. Initially, the schedule only specifies delivery and installation dates. The addition sets a 30-day delivery window, and then states that if the delivery is beyond 60 days, the schedule automatically terminates without penalty. However, Section 1 (The Customizations shall fulfill or exceed all of the functional, performance and other specifications described in the Program Materials and the documents prepared either by Bank of America or Supplier pursuant to this Agreement.) implies that failure to deliver is a breach and penalties are incurred. The original agreement in section 1 and modified section 6 now contradict each other concerning the penalty for late delivery, leading to uncertainty in enforcement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. The Customizations shall fulfill or exceed all of the functional, performance and other specifications described in the Program Materials and the documents prepared either by Bank of America or Supplier pursuant to this Agreement. as indicated below. No later than <<enter Customization Documents Delivery Date>>, Supplier shall deliver to Bank of America the documents described below for this Customization. The detailed specifications so delivered shall be incorporated herein when approved by Bank of America. System Solution Functional Specifications System Design Specifications Test Specifications Supplier acknowledges receipt of the following documents from Bank of America: Detailed Requirements
perturbation.justification: The modified Section 6 introduces a contradictory term regarding the consequences of late delivery. The original Section 1 states that the Customizations shall fulfill all specifications, implying a penalty for failure to deliver. The added clause in Section 6 states that if delivery is beyond 60 days, the schedule terminates without penalty. This directly conflicts with Section 1, creating an in-text contradiction about the consequences of failing to meet the delivery schedule. As the definition states 'Inconsistencies also lead to in-text contradictions when different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties.'

perturbation.original_text: 8. Project Personnel: Bank of America Project Administrator: Supplier Project Administrator: Bank of America Project Manager: Supplier Project Manager:
perturbation.changed_text: 8. Project Personnel: Bank of America Project Administrator: [Name A] Supplier Project Administrator: [Name B] Bank of America Project Manager: [Name C] Supplier Project Manager: [Name D]. Supplier Project Manager must be available 24/7 throughout the project's duration. Should the Supplier Project Manager be unavailable for more than 4 hours at any point, a penalty of $10,000 will be applied.
perturbation.explanation: This perturbation creates a contradiction regarding the availability and associated penalties for the Supplier Project Manager. The original text only lists roles. The modification introduces a strict 24/7 availability requirement and a substantial penalty for unavailability exceeding 4 hours. This directly contradicts the generality implied by Section 1, stating 'The Customizations shall fulfill or exceed all of the functional, performance and other specifications described in the Program Materials and the documents prepared either by Bank of America or Supplier pursuant to this Agreement.' Since the '24/7 availability' is not previously mentioned, the new penalty introduces uncertainty about project management obligations and if they are part of the agreements.
perturbation.contradicted_text: 1. The Customizations shall fulfill or exceed all of the functional, performance and other specifications described in the Program Materials and the documents prepared either by Bank of America or Supplier pursuant to this Agreement. as indicated below. No later than <<enter Customization Documents Delivery Date>>, Supplier shall deliver to Bank of America the documents described below for this Customization. The detailed specifications so delivered shall be incorporated herein when approved by Bank of America. System Solution Functional Specifications System Design Specifications Test Specifications Supplier acknowledges receipt of the following documents from Bank of America: Detailed Requirements
perturbation.justification: The change introduces a 24/7 availability requirement and a penalty for the Supplier Project Manager, which was not part of the original agreement as specified in Section 1. Section 1 states that 'The Customizations shall fulfill or exceed all of the functional, performance and other specifications described in the Program Materials and the documents prepared either by Bank of America or Supplier pursuant to this Agreement.' The added 24/7 availability term and the penalty contradict this by imposing a new obligation and consequence not previously agreed upon, creating an inconsistency regarding project management obligations. This aligns with the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' where 'different sections of a contract provide conflicting deadlines, obligations, or penalties.'
